  "analysis": "This page (14-3) contains only descriptive text about the automatic transmission system. The page describes: torque converter construction, gear and clutch arrangements, electronic control system (TCM), hydraulic control valve bodies, shift control mechanism, and lock-up mechanism.   "analysis": "This page (15-7) contains descriptive text and diagrams of the Honda ATTS (Active Torque Transfer System) unit.
